title: Product Manager/ Specialist – Beauty
description:
Role Summary

We are seeking a Product Specialist to support the end-to-end development of skincare and beauty products for a house brand. This role works closely with dermatologic labs, OEM/ODM partners, suppliers, and internal teams to translate product concepts into compliant, scalable, and market-ready products.

This is a coordination-heavy, execution-driven role, ideal for someone with hands-on experience in dermatologic labs, cosmetic R&D environments, or closely related industries.

Key Responsibilities

1. Product Development & Coordination

  • Act as a key point of contact between:

  • External dermatologic labs, OEM/ODM manufacturers, testing houses, and suppliers

    Internal teams including brand, marketing, supply chain, and quality

  • Support product development from concept to commercialization:

  • Formula briefing and iteration

    Ingredient review and alignment

    Sample development, revisions, and approvals

2. Testing, Safety & Compliance Support

  • Coordinate required product testing (e.g. stability, safety, efficacy where applicable)
  • Support documentation for regulatory and compliance needs across markets
  • Track and manage product development timelines and milestones

3. Technical & Product Knowledge Support

  • Provide technical input on:

  • Ingredients and formulations

    Claims feasibility (basic understanding, not regulatory sign-off)

    Product performance and user experience

  • Act as internal reference point for product-related questions from brand or marketing teams

4. Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Work closely with marketing and brand teams to ensure:

  • Product features and benefits are accurately translated into consumer-facing narratives

    Claims are aligned with formulation realities and test results

  • Support production handover and early-stage launch readiness

Requirements

  • Minimum 3 years of experience in: Dermatologic laboratory, cosmetic R&D lab, OEM/ODM skincare manufacturer, or related industry
  • Solid understanding of: Skincare product development workflows; Ingredients, formulations, and basic cosmetic science
  • Experience coordinating with multiple external partners simultaneously
  • Strong project management and communication skills
  • Detail-oriented, structured, and able to manage parallel development timelines

Nice to Have (Not Mandatory)

Experience with cross-border product development or multi-market launches

Familiarity with basic regulatory frameworks (e.g. ASEAN, China, EU – at a coordination level)

postedCompany.description: SHEIN Star is a global investment company focusing on food and beverage, fast fashion and beauty industry.
postedCompany.name: SHEIN STAR PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
